creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
> Thanks for your submission,
> 
> Please attach your poudriere testport build output, and include portlint -AC
> output after addressing any outstanding issues.

Poudriere log attached, also new update of port. So now portlint -AC returns:

WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.

As I understand it is OK now.

Thanks a lot.
